mapper.sql: r.id, r.request_id, r.correlation_id, r.normalized_order_id, r.erp_connection_id, r.operation, r.status, r.idempotency_key, r.erp_document_no, r.request_payload::text AS request_payload, r.response_payload::text AS response_payload, r.error_code, r.error_message, r.attempt_count, r.applied_at, r.created_at, r.updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM hub_erp_apply_result r JOIN hub_collected_order o ON o.id = r.normalized_order_id WHERE 1 = 1 ORDER BY r.updated_at DESC, r.id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hub_erp_apply_result r JOIN hub_collected_order o ON o.id = r.normalized_order_id WHERE 1 = 1
SELECT FROM hub_erp_apply_result r JOIN hub_collected_order o ON o.id = r.normalized_order_id WHERE r.id = #{id} AND o.corp_id = #{corpId}
SELECT FROM hub_erp_apply_result r JOIN hub_collected_order o ON o.id = r.normalized_order_id WHERE r.correlation_id = #{correlationId} AND o.corp_id = #{corpId} ORDER BY r.created_at ASC, r.id ASC
